hero.name: Alexandros Tsardoulias
hero.title: AI-Native Software Engineer & Marketing Specialist
hero.description: I help Founders, Startups, SMEs and NGOs achieve their goals by bridging technology, philosophy, growth strategy and best communication practices.

about.heading: About me
about.description: A blend of engineering rigor and marketing intuition. I build AI-native products, write code that matters, and help businesses find their voice in the digital space.

paragraphs: I help Founders, Startups, SMEs and NGOs achieve their goals by bridging technology, philosophy, growth strategy and best communication practices.
With my work, I transform ideas into scalable digital products and revenue-generating systems.
I studied Philosophy and Marketing Management while teaching myself to code and design.
Every project I lead combines measurable technical results with revenue-impact marketing, ensuring clients get both robust digital infrastructure and measurable business growth.
I don't just write code for web apps or manage social media and emails, I build holistic systems that generate measurable results.
I treat a product's technical architecture and its go-to-market strategy as one problem, not two.
